fields.label: Allowed Routing Legs
fields.description: Define which routing leg types can create Transport Orders from Air/Sea Shipment. E.g. Import + On-forwarding (company controls delivery), Export + Pre-carriage (company controls pickup).
Minimum allowed temperature in degrees Celsius. Temperatures below this value will be rejected.
fields.label: Minimum Temperature (°C)

fields.description: Maximum allowed temperature in degrees Celsius. Temperatures above this value will be rejected.
fields.label: Maximum Temperature (°C)
Container deposits and GL
fields.description: Pending carrier payments and pending carrier refunds are posted via Journal Entry through Debtors (AR) with a Customer party, offsetting the clearing account (see user documentation).

fields.label: Require Job Number on deposit lines
Deposit clearing account
fields.description: Balance sheet offset account paired with Debtors on container deposit JEs.

fields.label: Debtors override (optional)
fields.description: If empty, Company default receivable account is used for AR lines.

fields.label: Roles allowed to waive refund documents
fields.description: Comma-separated Role names. Users with any of these roles may set checklist rows to Waived with a reason.

fields.label: Measurements
fields.description: Base UOMs are used for conversion and reporting. Default UOMs are used when creating new lines.

fields.label: Base Dimension UOM
fields.description: Pivot UOM for length/width/height (e.g. CM).

fields.label: Base Volume UOM
fields.description: Pivot UOM for volume (e.g. CBM).

fields.label: Base Weight UOM
fields.description: Pivot UOM for weight and chargeable weight (e.g. KG).

fields.label: Default Dimension UOM
fields.description: Default for dimension_uom on new lines.

fields.label: Default Volume UOM
fields.description: Default for volume_uom on new lines.

fields.label: Default Weight UOM
fields.description: Default for weight_uom on new lines.

fields.label: Default Chargeable Weight UOM
fields.description: Default for chargeable_weight_uom on new lines.

fields.label: Enable Auto Status Updates
fields.description: When enabled, scheduled tasks will update milestone (Delayed), document (Overdue/Expired), permit, and exemption statuses automatically.

fields.label: Documents
fields.description: Alert levels: Critical = required date or expiry date past. Warning and Information = days before required date or expiry date.

fields.label: Warning (Days)
fields.description: Documents required or expiring within this many days show as Warning (yellow).

fields.label: Information (Days)
fields.description: Documents required or expiring within this many days (beyond Warning window) show as Information (blue). Must be greater than Warning (Days) for Information alerts to appear.

fields.label: Milestones
fields.description: Alert levels: Critical = delayed (past planned end). Warning and Information = days before planned end.

fields.label: Warning (Days)
fields.description: Milestones due within this many days show as Warning (yellow).

fields.label: Information (Days)
fields.description: Milestones due within this many days show as Information (blue). Must be greater than Warning (Days) for Information alerts to appear.

fields.label: Strict Milestone Schedule Validation
fields.description: When enabled, Actual End cannot be earlier than Planned Start. Disable only if early completion before planned start is part of your process.

fields.label: Penalties
fields.description: Alert levels: Critical = free time exceeded. Warning = days before free time expires.

fields.label: Warning (Days)
fields.description: Days before free time expires to show Warning (yellow).

fields.label: Delays
fields.description: Alert levels: Critical = delayed. Warning = days before expected delay.

fields.label: Warning (Days)
fields.description: Days before expected delay to show Warning (yellow).

fields.label: Enable logistics credit control
fields.description: When enabled, documents for customers on credit hold are controlled after hold conditions: either **Apply hold to all DocTypes** (full defaults for every registered DocType) or per-row **Subject DocTypes** below.

fields.label: Hold conditions
fields.description: A customer is under credit hold when any enabled condition is true: manual status (Customer > Credit tab), credit limit exceeded, or overdue sales invoices (payment terms deviation).

fields.label: Hold when Credit Status is On Hold
Hold when Credit Status is Watch
Hold when credit limit is exceeded
fields.description: Uses ERPNext customer / group / company credit limit vs outstanding (same basis as Selling).

fields.label: Hold on payment terms deviation
fields.description: Hold when any submitted Sales Invoice for the customer and company has outstanding amount and due date before today minus grace days.

fields.label: Bypass role
fields.description: Users with this role skip credit blocks (optional).

fields.label: Apply hold to all DocTypes
fields.description: When enabled, every registered logistics DocType in credit control uses Warn on save and Hold create, submit, and print. The Subject DocTypes table is disabled and ignored.

fields.label: DocTypes subject to credit hold
fields.description: When **Apply hold to all DocTypes** is off, add one row per DocType and set Warn / Hold columns. When it is on, the table is disabled; all registered DocTypes in code are subject to full hold behaviour.

fields.label: Subject DocTypes
fields.description: Ignored when **Apply hold to all DocTypes** is checked. Otherwise one row per DocType (must also be registered in code).
